_comment: NPC: Zhang Tian (张天). Heng Yue Sect outer sect elder — annual aptitude recruiter for Zhao Country. Canon ID: N-REC-001 (derived). Per PROJECT_MASTER.md §5.3: this NPC triggers the Day 3 ceremony. He is NOT a combat entity — he arrives, tests children, accepts them, and departs.
name: Zhang Tian
personality: impassive, dutiful, slightly weary from years of recruitment; takes patrol seriously, has seen too many disciples fail to be impressed by ambition

perception_tiers.mortal: A stern man in blue robes who descended from the sky
perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Heng Yue Sect outer elder, Foundation Establishment realm

note: Annual recruiter. Appears at Wang Family Village on Day 3. Triggers aptitude test ceremony (AptitudeTestEvent.java). Per §5.4: the player can also find him on the road for an early ceremony trigger.

dao_heart.note: Stable but unremarkable. He does his duty.

desires.what: Mutters about the low quality of this year's candidates
desires.why: Zhang Tian is a higher-realm elder overseeing the recruitment drive. He has seen thousands of candidates. Per his personality: 'weary from years of recruitment.' He would comment to the lower recruiter.
desires.source: INFERRED: Zhang Tian's personality says 'impassive, dutiful, slightly weary.' An elder overseeing recruitment would comment to subordinates.
desires.line: Three villages so far. One candidate with potential. The rest are farmers who will forget they ever saw a testing stone.

desires.what: Warn anyone near the village about the ancient restriction arrays to the north
desires.why: Per Zhang Tian's initiation_lines: 'The restriction arrays along the northern border are ancient. Do not test them.' He is a Foundation Establishment elder who knows the dangers. This is him acting on his duty to warn.
desires.source: EXPLICIT: Zhang Tian's own initiation_lines mention the northern restriction arrays and warn about them.
desires.line: The restriction arrays along the northern border are ancient. Do not test them. They will not warn you twice.

initiation_lines: I have seen thousands of candidates pass through Heng Yue's gates. Few have what it takes to endure.
The restriction arrays along the northern border are ancient. Do not test them. They will not warn you twice.
Complete your sect duties before chasing personal breakthroughs. The sect protects you — you owe it your effort.
night_lines: You should not be wandering the sect grounds at this hour. State your business, disciple.
The eastern perimeter needs watching tonight. If you see anything unusual — spiritual fluctuations, unfamiliar faces — report to me immediately.
Curfew is not a suggestion. Return to your quarters unless you have patrol duties.
I have walked these paths for decades. The night has eyes. Do nothing you would not explain to the Sect Master.

sect_tasks.description: Report to Elder Zhang. Bring spirit stones as proof of sect contribution.
The sect armory needs cold iron for weapon repair. Mine in the northern caves.
